title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
